subject: [PATCH v3 4/8] io_uring/kbuf: return buffer id in buffer selection

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: The change looks good and addresses a long-standing issue with buffer recycling. However, it would be beneficial to add some documentation to explain the new functionality and its implications.

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch series introduces a new feature to the io_uring subsystem, allowing for kernel-managed buffer rings and enabling the recycling of selected buffers. The first patch in the series modifies the io_buffer_select function to return the id of the selected buffer.
